# arubasdwan_app_dns_classifications (Data Source)

Fetches user-defined DNS classification application definitions from the Aruba SD-WAN Orchestrator via GET /gms/rest/applicationDefinition?base=dnsClassification&resourceKey=userDefined.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "arubasdwan_app_dns_classifications" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `dns_classifications` (Attributes List) List of DNS classification application definitions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--dns_classifications))

<a id="nestedatt--dns_classifications"></a>
### Nested Schema for `dns_classifications`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) The description of the application.
- `disabled` (Boolean) Whether the classification is disabled.
- `domain` (String) The DNS domain pattern (e.g. "*.example.com").
- `name` (String) The name of the application.
- `priority` (Number) The confidence/priority of the classification.
